projectDescription: A PyTorch-based open-source framework for deep learning in healthcare imaging, providing domain-specific tools for medical image I/O, transforms, networks, losses, metrics, and end-to-end training workflows.
keyFeatures: Domain-specific medical image transforms (spatial, intensity, I/O) with array and dictionary APIs
MetaTensor — PyTorch tensor extended with medical image metadata
50+ neural network architectures including UNet, SwinUNETR, SegResNet, ViT, DiffusionModelUNet
Medical loss functions: DiceLoss, GeneralizedDiceLoss, HausdorffDTLoss, FocalLoss, TverskyLoss
Evaluation metrics: MeanDice, HausdorffDistance, SurfaceDistance, ROCAUC, ConfusionMatrix
CacheDataset, PersistentDataset, SmartCacheDataset for accelerated training pipelines
Sliding window inference with configurable overlap and blending modes
MONAI Bundle: packaged model format with structured JSON configs for training and inference
Auto3DSeg: automated 3D medical image segmentation pipeline
Federated learning support via MonaiAlgo and ClientAlgo abstractions
Multi-GPU distributed training compatible with PyTorch DDP, Horovod, and SLURM
C++/CUDA extensions for Resampler, CRF, and fast bilateral filtering
publicApiSurface: monai.transforms — Compose, RandAffine, NormalizeIntensity, LoadImage, CropForeground, and 200+ transforms
monai.data.MetaTensor — core data structure combining Tensor with metadata
monai.networks.nets — UNet, SwinUNETR, SegResNet, UNETR, DynUNet, ViT, ResNet, DiffusionModelUNet, VISTA3D
monai.losses — DiceLoss, DiceCELoss, GeneralizedDiceLoss, FocalLoss, TverskyLoss, HausdorffDTLoss
monai.metrics — MeanDice, HausdorffDistanceMetric, SurfaceDistanceMetric, ROCAUCMetric, ConfusionMatrixMetric
monai.bundle.ConfigParser, BundleWorkflow — structured config-based workflow definition
monai.fl.client.MonaiAlgo, ClientAlgo — federated learning client abstraction
monai.visualize — CAM, GradCAM, GradCAMpp, matshow3d, blend_images
